title: The Missing Star Fruit
shortDescription: When Ube Baby's favorite glowing star fruit goes missing, Pineapple Baby sets out to find it — only to discover that Tiki Trouble has been up to his sneaky tricks again.
lesson: It's okay to ask for help when something feels too big to handle alone.
setting: Starlight Garden and the edge of Trouble Island

scenes.title: A Missing Treasure
scenes.summary: Ube Baby wakes up to find her glowing star fruit is gone. She feels sad and worried. Pineapple Baby notices and immediately offers to help find it.
scenes.visualNotes: Soft morning light in Starlight Garden. Cozy, dreamy atmosphere. Ube Baby's expression shifts from sleepy to sad.

scenes.title: Clues on the Beach
scenes.summary: Pineapple Baby and Ube Baby follow a trail of sparkle dust leading toward Trouble Island. They spot tiny footprints and hear a distant 'Hehehe!'
scenes.visualNotes: Sandy tropical beach. Sparkle trail glimmering in the sand. Coconut trees in the background.

scenes.title: Tiki's Big Mistake
scenes.summary: Tiki Trouble is discovered trying to use the star fruit as a fancy new hat decoration. He insists it belongs to him now. But when Pineapple Baby explains how much it means to Ube Baby, Tiki pauses — and feels a tiny pang of guilt.
scenes.visualNotes: Dramatic Trouble Island scene. Tiki is caught in the act. Exaggerated expressions throughout.

scenes.title: A Surprising Return
scenes.summary: Tiki grumpily gives back the star fruit, muttering that he didn't even want it anyway. Ube Baby thanks him gently. Tiki stomps off but secretly glances back with a tiny smile.
scenes.visualNotes: Warm sunset colors. Tiki's retreat is dramatic but hints at a softer side. Ube Baby and Pineapple Baby share a cozy hug.
